title: Ritual Magic Resource pack
description: A Ritual Magic data pack dependency(not anymore)
body:
**This project is archived because I've learned about mixed packs and now my project is a mixed pack, that means if you want to install Ritual Magic go to [main page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ritual-magic) and read the description.** ### This Resource pack is made for [Ritual Magic data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ritual-magic/)
### what it adds? - unpowered magic stick texture - powered magic stick texture
